description.value: Price 8,600 gp; Slot none; CL 4th; Weight 1 lb.; Aura faint evocation DESCRIPTION Note This item is associated with a particular deity that can not be named here. This aged and worn scabbard is believed to have once held one of a dozen legendary scimitar relics. From its prolonged proximity to such a divine blade, the scabbard has acquired its own unique magical abilities. Twice per day on command, the wearer can draw forth a blazing beam of red-hot fire from the scabbard that can be wielded as if it were a scimitar, as per flame blade. If the associated deity is the wearerâs patron, half of the flame bladeâs damage is fire damage, but the other half results directly from divine power and is therefore not subject to being reduced by resistance to fire. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 4,300 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells flame blade, flame strike
